name: Amazon sellers processing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 5–15 contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause penalties and lost revenue. We provide timely reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Missed contract renewals leading to penalties and lost revenue.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Missed contract renewals leading to penalties and lost revenue.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 5–15 contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause penalties and lost revenue. We provide timely reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendar reminders.

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 5–15 contracts/month, missed contract renewals cause penalties and lost revenue. We provide timely reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
